Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(''Round:'', data.get\(''round'',{}\).get\(''name'',''?''\)\) print\(''Status:'', data.get\(''round'',{}\).get\(''status'',''?''\)\) evs = data.get\(''evaluators'',[]\) print\(f''Evaluators count: {len\(evs\)}''\) for ev in evs: print\(f'' - id={ev[""id""]} name={ev[""display_name""]} role={ev.get\(""role"",""?""\)} first_assigned={ev.get\(""first_assigned"",0\)} first_completed={ev.get\(""first_completed"",0\)}''\) " echo "")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in data: print\(f'' id={r[""id""]} name={r[""name""]} status={r[""status""]} rubric_id={r.get\(""rubric_id"",""null""\)}''\) " echo "" echo "=== Progress \(Round 1\) ===" curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1/rounds/1/progress  -H "Authorization: Bearer $LEADER_TOKEN")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) r = data.get\(''round'',{}\) print\(f''Round: {r.get\(""name"",""?""\)} Status: {r.get\(""status"",""?""\)}''\) stats = data.get\(''statistics'', {}\) print\(f''Stats: total_essays={stats.get\(""total_essays"",0\)} first_completed={stats.get\(""first_completed"",0\)}''\) evs = data.get\(''evaluators'',[]\) print\(f''Evaluator count: {len\(evs\)}''\) for ev in evs: print\(f'' - id={ev[""id""]} name={ev[""display_name""]} role={ev.get\(""role"",""?""\)} first_assigned={ev.get\(""first_assigned"",0\)} first_completed={ev.get\(""first_completed"",0\)}''\) " echo "" echo "=== Rubrics ===" curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1/rubrics  -H "Authorization: Bearer $LEADER_TOKEN")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f''Total: {len\(data\)}''\) for r in data: crit = r.get\(''criteria'',[]\) print\(f'' id={r[""id""]} name={r[""name""]} criteria_count={len\(crit\) if crit else 0}''\) " echo "" echo "=== Essays \(Round 1\) ===" curl -s "http://localhost:3001/api/v1/rounds/1/essays?page=1&limit=5"  -H "Authorization: Bearer $LEADER_TOKEN")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f''Total: {data.get\(""total"",0\)}''\) for e in data.get\(''essays'',[]\)[:3]: print\(f'' id={e[""id""]} receipt={e.get\(""receipt_number"",""?""\)} defective={e.get\(""is_defective"",""?""\)} first_status={e.get\(""first_status"",""?""\)}''\) " echo "" echo "=== Evaluator Assignments \(000003\) ===" curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1/assignments/mine  -H "Authorization: Bearer $EVAL_TOKEN")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f''Total: {len\(data\)}''\) for a in data: print\(f'' id={a[""id""]} essay_id={a[""essay_id""]} phase={a[""phase""]} status={a[""status""]}''\) print\(f'' receipt={a.get\(""receipt_number"",""?""\)} round={a.get\(""round_name"",""?""\)} is_defective={a.get\(""is_defective"",""?""\)}''\) print\(f'' score_id={a.get\(""score_id"",""?""\)} first_score={a.get\(""first_score"",""?""\)}''\) if a.get\(''essay_first_score''\) is not None: print\(f'' essay_first_score={a[""essay_first_score""]}''\) if a.get\(''first_phase_summary''\): print\(f'' first_phase_summary={a[""first_phase_summary""]}''\) if a.get\(''first_student_number''\): print\(f'' first_student_number={a[""first_student_number""]}''\) " echo "" echo "=== Availability Summary ===" curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1/availability/summary  -H "Authorization: Bearer $LEADER_TOKEN")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for u in data: print\(f'' id={u[""id""]} login_id={u.get\(""login_id"",""?""\)} name={u[""display_name""]} role={u.get\(""role"",""?""\)} capacity={u.get\(""total_capacity"",0\)} assigned={u.get\(""assigned_count"",0\)}''\) " echo "" echo "=== Training ===" curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/v1/training  -H "Authorization: Bearer $LEADER_TOKEN")
